title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 515.150 - Punishment for refusal to testify
text:
515.150.  Punishment for refusal to testify. — If either party shall refuse to be sworn, or when sworn shall refuse to answer any proper question, the referees may imprison him until he consents to be sworn or to answer such question.
(RSMo 1939 § 1155) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 989; 1919 § 1439; 1909 § 2009
